testcase.name: shouldUpdateRoleWithUppercaseName

testcase.name: shouldListAllRolesSuccessfully

testcase.name: shouldThrowExceptionWhenCreatingRoleWithInvalidData
testcase.system-out: 08:19:01.517 [main] WARN c.k.m.a.s.e.AlreadyExistsException - Recurso já existe: Role já existe - Código: RESOURCE_ALREADY_EXISTS - Contexto: {} 08:19:01.520 [main] INFO c.k.m.a.in.rest.role.RoleController - Criando role: USER, application=59b468c0-e163-4556-8a6f-bbccb32bdd21

testcase.name: shouldReturnEmptyPageWhenNoRolesInSearch

testcase.name: shouldGetRoleByIdSuccessfully

testcase.name: shouldDeleteRoleSuccessfully

testcase.name: shouldUpdateRoleSuccessfully

testcase.name: shouldThrowExceptionWhenUpdatingNonExistentRole

testcase.name: shouldReturn404WhenRoleNotFoundByName
